items.title: Longevity Startup Doses First Human in Bid to Reverse Age-Related Sight Loss
items.summary: It will be the first time ER-100 technology they claim can reverse aging in cells has been tested on a human.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Lovable says it has hit $500M in annualized revenue, with 1 million new projects a week
items.summary: Lovable says it has now surpassed $500 million in annualized run-rate revenue and its users are building businesses and replacing internal software.
